title: Fluffy Indulgent Raw-friendly Dutch White Cabbage Stir-fry
description: A fermented and fluffy raw-friendly dish featuring white cabbage whisked with a touch of indulgence for a delightful meal.

ingredients.name: soy sauce
ingredients.amount: 2 tbsp (use fermented or tamari for vegan option)

instructions: Combine shredded white cabbage and finely minced ginger in a bowl.
Add sesame oil to the cabbage mixture and whisk well until it becomes fluffy and cohesive.
Gradually add soy sauce while continuing to whisk. If using fish sauce, add at the end after stirring thoroughly.
If desired, you can gently heat the mixture for about 30 seconds over low heat to meld the flavors better, ensuring not exceeding 145°F (63°C) as a safety measure.
Serve immediately or store in refrigerator up to 2 days. Enjoy your indulgent raw-friendly Dutch dish!
